user_query: I'm planning a hiking trip with my friends. Can you provide news articles about the best hiking trails and camping spots? Additionally, find images of scenic landscapes and outdoor gear for hiking. Also, check the spelling of the word 'hicking' and suggest the correct spelling.

TaskList.description: Search for news articles related to the best hiking trails and camping spots.
Find and retrieve images of scenic landscapes suitable for hiking.
Search for information and images of outdoor gear for hiking.
Check the spelling of the word 'hicking' and suggest the correct spelling.
